title: cinnagrostis minima
intro: Cinnagrostis minima, also known as dwarf bottlebrush, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the family Myoporaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cinnagrostis minima include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and applications.
